feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MDG consolidation match group discrepancy
entry.content: In MDG Consolidation. I am tring to run a process (Process A) for consolidation of Active records. I get match groups when I run with selection criteria where Business Partners with role FLVN01. However, when I run another process(Process B) for consolidation of Active records, this time selectioncriteria where Business Partners with role FLVN01 and country is Belgium which also gives me match groups.. However when I see the number of match groups for country Belgium in Process A (although containsalso match gorup from other countries I only focus on Belgium) and Process B it is not same.. Infact  Process A has less Match groups from the country Belgium compared to process B.It is not that the BP from Belgium is now part of a different atch gorup in process A, my question is it is not there in any match gorup in Process A but it is present in Process B. How can there be a difference if the same match rule was applied and the only difference is that I added country as Belgium in the selection criteria?

entry.title: sap mdg contact person "Enter correspondence language" error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am facing an issue in SAP MDG while creating a Contact Person under a Customer.

When I try to add a new contact person, I receive the following errors:

  • Enter a value for field Correspondence Language
  • Enter a value for field Country/Region Key

However:

  • These fields are not visible on the UI,
  • I am not able to maintain them manually,
  • As a result, I cannot proceed with the creation.

How can i solve this problem?

entry.title: Vendor blocked for posting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm new to SAP and I have been working for a few weeks now on MDG tasks.

I have one vendor which is blocked from posting and I need to know how this block was triggered. In the change history I get SAP_WFRT but this is general for any system change, and it's not helping. The change could have came from non-SAP system but how can I trace this back?

Appreciate all the help.

entry.title: SAP MDG inbound BP webservice, does not copy LongPartTaxId value from payload to staging area
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are facing an issue in processing the inbound BP webservice in SAP MDG.

After receiving BP supplier webservice from a third party system into MDG, the LongPartyTaxId value is not getting copied into staging area of the CR.

After debugging the implementaion class of Badi MDG_SE_BP_BULK_REPLRQ_IN, i found that the value from payload is not copied into LongPartyTaxId field in the IN parameter and therefore not passed into staging area and it leads to error 'Enter tax number for tax category'.

This issue happens only when payload contains tax type category 5 and above.

Kindly let me know the potential reason behind this.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to create Follow up cr plant wise in sap mdg by using api
entry.content:
Background:
Parent CR: Plants will be added to the cr and the cr will be activated,
then after create follow up cr plant wise.
CR1 For Plant 1: CR1 should contain only plant1 data
CR2 For Plant 2: CR2 should contain only plant 2 data.
I have configure follow up cr as Active for parallel change processing.
I am able to create parallel cr but in both cr I can see data for Plant 1 and Plant2.
I tried deleting the data by using Governance api and change request api.
cr,  but unable to do so
Is there any other way to achieve the required functionality?

entry.title: Looking for Standard SAP Solution for Master Data Creation Requests with Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I would like to ask for guidance on whether SAP provides a standard solution for handling master data creation/change requests. Specifically for Equipment, including an approval workflow and automated creation in the system.

Current Situation in Our Company

We have a Master Data Coordinator who is responsible for creating and updating master data in SAP. Our current process looks like this:

  1. A user wants to create or change an equipment.
  2. The user fills out a manual form/template explaining the required data and the reason for the request.
  3. The user submits this form into an approval workflow in SAP PLM.
  4. After all approvals are completed, the Master Data Coordinator manually:
    • Opens the form
    • Copies/pastes all values into SAP
    • Creates or updates the equipment

Challenges

  • Manual copy/paste introduces a high risk of human error.
  • The process is slow and depends heavily on one person.
  • We want to reduce manual work and improve data quality.

What We Want to Achieve

We are looking for a standard SAP process or Fiori app that would allow:

  1. A user submits a request to create an equipment directly in SAP (via Fiori or another standard interface).
  2. The request to go through an approval workflow.
  3. After approval, the system should automatically create the equipment in SAP without manual intervention.

Essentially, we want to replace the manual form + manual data entry with a more integrated, automated, and error‑free process.

My Questions to the Community

  • Does SAP offer a standard Fiori app or standard workflow for equipment creation/change requests?
  • Is there a standard SAP component (e.g., PLM, EAM-specific apps) that supports:
    • Request submission
    • Approval workflow
    • Automatic creation of equipment after approval
  • If yes, what would be the recommended approach?

Why This Matters

We want to avoid building a large custom solution if SAP already provides something standard. Our goal is to:

  • Improve data quality
  • Reduce manual work
  • Minimize errors
  • Streamline the approval process

Any insights, recommendations, or experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: ALRTCATDEF - How to change the error message format from action FM (MDG)
entry.content:
Hi,

Kindly help to get the ALRTCATDEF message in proper format.
I have done the ALRTCATDEF setup in my MDG system. In the action FM I am filling my return_tab with error messages.
If return_tab has error messges then AIF alert is triggered and also mail is triggered. The mail is configured in ALRTCATDEF in long/short message text tab. There, I am using container object to fill the message. Container object has message with type bapiret2. I am using that and only specified message filed with multiple lines as continuous text (&messages[].message[]&).

But when I get mail, whole bapiret2 structure also comes in mail.
Example: <msg_type> <msg_class> <msg_num> <message> <msg_v1> <msg_v2> etc.

(E ZMSG_CLS 009 Error in CR Request Error in CR Request)

But expectation is just the <message> since I added only the message field (&messages[].message[]&) like: Error in CR Request.

Did someone encountered such issue or this is just standard and SAP processes all the fields of return_tab?

If not please help me configure it correctly. Please fell free to ask any inputs.

Thanks,
Rahul

entry.title: ALRTCATDEF - How to change the error message format from action FM (MDG)
entry.content:
Hi all,

Kindly help to get the ALRTCATDEF message in proper format.

I have done the ALRTCATDEF setup in my MDG system. In the action FM I am filling my return_tab with error messages.

If return_tab has error messges then AIF alert is triggered and also mail is triggered. The mail is configured in ALRTCATDEF in long/short message text tab. There, I am using container object to fill the message. Container object has message with type bapiret2. I am using that and only specified message filed with multiple lines as continuous text (&messages[].message[]&).

 

But when I get mail, whole bapiret2 structure also comes in mail.

Example: <msg_type> <msg_class> <msg_num> <message> <msg_v1> <msg_v2> etc.

 

(E ZMSG_CLS 009 Error in CR Request Error in CR Request)

 

But expectation is just the <message> since I added only the message field (&messages[].message[]&) like: Error in CR Request.

 

Did someone encountered such issue or this is just standard and SAP processes all the fields of return_tab?

 

If not please help me configure it correctly. Please fell free to ask any inputs.

 

Thanks,

Rahul

entry.title: Top 14 Space consuming tables in MDG PMD system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please find the attached document list of Top 14 space consuming tables in MDG PMD system for your reference.
Top 14 Tables-

SWWCNTP0, USMD_PP_CDCDPOS, EDID4, ADRVP, BDCP2, EDIDS, SWWWIRET, APQD, SWP_NODEWI, SWW_WI2OBJ, SWPNODE, E071K, DOKTL.
Kindly review the file and suggest the required actions needed to perform to reduce the space of the table.


Thanks.

entry.title: Consuming API in RAP for Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using the Onpremise system where i have built RAP on top of this API for business partner.

In gateway test client service works fine and no issue in it.

I have built the class with required interface of RAP and when i run the class system goes 404 error.

Kindly suggest some idea on this. Thanks.

Issue is as below:

1. In the last statment of this code, when i debug the standard on the list of Entity set...I am not finding ENTITY as BUSINESS_PARTNER .

Am i missing anything on the below code ?

Service is already in active status.

I am not getting the response and it end up with error 404 .

cl_http_client=>create_by_destination( EXPORTING destination = 'NONE'

IMPORTING client = DATA(lo_http_client)

EXCEPTIONS argument_not_found = 1

destination_not_found = 2

destination_no_authority = 3

plugin_not_active = 4

OTHERS = 5 ).

 

 

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_client_proxy_fact=>create_v2_remote_proxy(

EXPORTING

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZABC'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/' ).

 

" Navigate to the resource

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'BUSINESS_PARTNER' )->create_request_for_read( ).

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Customer - General Data - Export: CIVVE field ECC exists, while S4 does not exist.
entry.content: Customer - General Data - Export: CIVVE field ECC exists, while S4 does not exist.

entry.title: BP data quality evaluation does not start
entry.content:
Hi community,

on an S/4HANA on premise 2023 release we setup so far everything for the BP data quality evaluation. We created a validation rule on ADRC with active BRF+ rules, assgned this rule to a dimension but the evaluation process does not start. The status will never change and stays in "Initializing Process" (FIORI App "F1047A"). 

Someone an idea what could be the still the issue? 

Thanks

Best regards

DL

entry.title: "Entre the MRP Type" error while replication of material from MDG to S4
entry.content:
Dear All

While replicating materials from MDG to S4 using DRFOUT, we are getting an error in the S4 log as  "Enter the MRP Type"

Note: The material is created in MDG without any of the MRP Views and We have also kept the MRP type field as optional for the Material type in OMS9. 

Is there any other setting that can possibly avoid this error?

Error screenshot: 

Thanks in advance

Pradeep

SAP Master Data Governance  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Manufacturing MM (Materials Management)

entry.title: Pros and Cons of implementing full MDG within Central finance in sap
entry.content:
Hi MDG Experts,

We are implementing Central finance now and also want to implement SAP MDG for the data governance later.

We have options to host MDG on a separate Hub system or to host MDG within Central finance (embedded/co-deployed MDG).

Experts, can you please throw light on the pros and cons of implementing MDG within Central finance and any considerations compare to MDG Hub approach?

Thanks

entry.title: Name 3 field in the Bank data of BP
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Good day.

In bank data screen of BP, few fields (Name, Street, City) of bank details are currently displayed from BNKA table. We are trying to display Name 3 field of Bank also in this screen. When I was working on the bank entity earlier, it was not recommended to modify any attributes in bank entity as it connected across multiple objects. 

Is there any OSS to display Name 3 field in the same UIBB of bank screen in BP instead of creating new UIBB?

Regards,

Raghu

entry.title: NO MDG roadmap sessions at the SAP sapphire 2026?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I couldn't help but notice that there was no session in Sapphire this year around MDG capabilities, considering all the acquisitions of data-related companies like Relito & Dremio. What is the high level plan for integration with MDG.

If anyone has any insights, please share.

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Master Data 

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: MDG BP Design for Branch Companies for country -India (Same Legal Entity with Multiple GST)
entry.content:
Hi,

Would require help to find out standard solution for branch companies for country India (IN) should hold multiple GST numbers linked to each region(state). Please find attached document for more details.

Thanks,

Nanda Prasad

entry.title: MDG BP: UI not refreshing for specific entities (BP_CENTRL, FS_BP001) after Enrichment Spot
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently implementing an Enrichment Spot on the BP data model. I have created two enrichment spots, but only one of them is working as expected.

I created a new CR copied from the standard SUPPL1P1, which uses the business activity SUP1. In MDGIMG, I created and added the FEEDER and ADAPTER to process 00. To prevent the enrichment from triggering on every single user input, I added a custom button in CL_BS_BP_OVP_ASSIST and trigger the click using io_event_data->get_value.

For the CR ZXXXXX (the SUPPL1P1 copy), the enrichment works perfectly. The flow passes through the FEEDER to send data to the ADAPTER, runs the process, and upon returning to the FEEDER, I modify the ENTITIES in the IF_USMD_ENRICHMENT_FEEDER~GET_MDG_DATA method. For this CR, I have two processes: one enrichment with a pop-up prompting a user choice, and another without a pop-up (the WD is created but empty). The first Spot successfully updates the BP_CENTRL, AD_POSTAL, and FS_BP001 entities based on the user's choice in the pop-up. The second one works similarly; the API return from the ADAPTER correctly updates the necessary entities in the background.

Previously, I had a synchronization issue with the FS_BP001 entity. The Financial Services table wasn't refreshing on the UI right after the FEEDER output. I had to manually trigger an action on an input field using the FPM_REFRESH event in its UIBB, or click "Save" to see the changes. To fix this, I added the following code in the USMD_MDG_RULE_SERVICEBAdI: lo_fpm_event = cl_fpm_event=>create_by_id( iv_event_id = 'CR_CHECK' ).

The Issue: Now, I am working with CR ZXXXX2 (copied from standard SUPPL2P1, business activity SUP2). I applied the exact same configuration and created a new FEEDER and ADAPTER. However, when I update the entities in the FEEDER after the ADAPTER returns, BP_CENTRL and FS_BP001 are not updated immediately on the UI. Strangely, AD_POSTAL is updated correctly. I have to force a sync via a manual user action on the CR to see BP_CENTRLand FS_BP001 properly populated.

Even my previous workaround using lo_fpm_event = cl_fpm_event=>create_by_id( iv_event_id = 'CR_CHECK' ) doesn't fix the issue this time.

Does anyone have an idea why this is happening or what I might be missing?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to Prevent Duplicate GST Numbers in Customer and Supplier Master Data in SAP S/4HANA Public Clou
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have a business requirement related to GST number validation in Business Partner master data.

The business wants to ensure that the GST Number (Tax Number) maintained in a Customer or Supplier master record is unique across the system.

The expected behavior is as follows:

  • When a user creates or updates a Customer or Supplier master record and enters a GST number, the system should automatically check whether the same GST number already exists in any existing Customer or Supplier master record.
  • If the GST number does not exist, the system should allow the record to be saved.
  • If the GST number already exists, the system should prevent the save operation and display an appropriate error message indicating that a duplicate GST number exists.

We are aware of the Configure Matching and Duplicate Check (SSCUI 100274) functionality. However, our requirement is to enforce a hard validation during save, rather than only identifying potential duplicates.

Could you please advise:

  • Is there any standard functionality available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to enforce uniqueness of GST numbers across Business Partners?
  • Can this requirement be achieved through SSCUI configuration, Business Partner duplicate checks, validation rules, or key user extensibility?
  • Has anyone implemented a similar requirement in a Public Cloud environment?
  • Are there any SAP-recommended best practices for preventing duplicate GST registrations?

Any guidance, documentation references, or implementation experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Siva Nagi Reddy

entry.title: WorkforcePerson Integration from SF to S4 HANA via MDI
entry.content:
We have a Requirement to Store the "Position" in S4 HANA Public Cloud from SF through MDI. In SuccessFactors we have the standard Field called  "Position" and same receiving to MDI. 

SAP GROW don't have any standard "Position" and Created a Custom Field and we are Implemented  the BADI WFD_MDI_EXT_FIELD_MAPPING, its working , whereas our actual Requirement is Standard Read the Field of MDI.

Can somebody help us how to proceed with this requirement?
